hero.title: Intelligent Knowledge Management for Enterprise
hero.subtitle: KnowFlow AI delivers production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation with deep document understanding, multi-model orchestration, and enterprise security.
hero.poweredBy: Built on RAGFlow — the most starred open-source RAG engine

features.title: Everything You Need for Enterprise RAG
features.subtitle: A comprehensive platform that transforms your documents into intelligent, queryable knowledge bases.

coreRag.title: Core RAG Engine
coreRag.description: Deep document parsing with layout recognition, table extraction, and intelligent chunking for superior retrieval accuracy.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready
enterprise.description: Role-based access control, audit logging, SSO integration, and compliance-ready deployment options.

ai.title: Multi-Model AI
ai.description: Orchestrate across OpenAI, Anthropic, local LLMs, and custom models with automatic fallback and load balancing.

dataSources.title: Universal Data Sources
dataSources.description: Connect PDF, Word, Excel, web pages, databases, APIs, and more. 50+ format support out of the box.

deployment.title: Flexible Deployment
deployment.description: Deploy on-premise, private cloud, or hybrid. Docker, Kubernetes, and air-gapped environment support.

commercial.title: Commercial License
commercial.description: Full commercial license with priority support, SLA guarantees, and dedicated customer success team.

architecture.title: Built for Scale
architecture.subtitle: A modern architecture designed for reliability, performance, and extensibility.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include core RAG capabilities.

free.name: Community
free.description: For individual developers and small teams

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with specific needs

contact.title: Book a Demo
contact.subtitle: See KnowFlow AI in action. Our team will walk you through a personalized demo.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.message: Tell us about your use case
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.description: Enterprise-grade RAG engine for intelligent knowledge management.

portal.manageDesc: Manage your KnowFlow AI licenses and activations.
portal.noLicenses: No licenses yet. Purchase your first license to get started.
portal.myLicensesDesc: View and manage your KnowFlow AI license keys.
portal.licenseActivationDesc: Activate your KnowFlow AI license on a new machine.
portal.step1Desc: Choose which license you want to activate on a new machine.
portal.step2Desc: Run the KnowFlow CLI on your target machine and paste the generated request code below.
portal.step3Desc: Copy this code and paste it into the KnowFlow CLI to complete activation.
portal.requestCodePlaceholder: Paste your activation request code here...
portal.settingsDesc: Manage your account and organization preferences.
portal.profileDesc: Your personal information managed through Clerk.
portal.companyInfoDesc: Organization details for license invoicing and certificates.
portal.billingDesc: View your billing history and manage payment methods.

admin.issueLicenseDesc: Manually create and sign a license for a customer.
admin.createCustomerDesc: Add a new customer to issue licenses for.
admin.name: Name
admin.activationRequestHint: If provided, generates a machine-bound KnowFlow license key.
admin.resultDesc: Generated license keys will appear here.
admin.resultPlaceholder: Fill in the form and click "Issue License" to generate keys.
admin.sendToCustomer: Send this key to the customer.
admin.noRequestProvided: No activation request provided. The customer needs to generate one from their KnowFlow admin panel first.
